summary: Frontend-only dark theme verification completed. All Calculator sections display correctly with dark backgrounds (#1B232C) and good text contrast (white #F5F5F5 on dark backgrounds). Gold (#D4AF37), green (#10b981), and amber (#D97B2D) accent colors working properly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All dark theme features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark theme fully verified with Algeria (DZA) → Senegal (SEN), HS code 090111, value 50000 USD. All sections have proper contrast.

calculator_form.details: Dark background (#1B232C), white labels, gold title, dark inputs with proper border styling, country selects working with ISO3 codes

country_selects.details: Both origin (DZA) and destination (SEN) selects are usable with dark theme styling, flags displayed correctly

tariff_calculation_results.details: Results display with dark background, authentic data badge in green, tax rates shown as badges (D.D: 20%, RS: 1%, PCS: 1%, T.V.A: 18%)

npf_vs_zlecaf_tables.details: Side-by-side comparison with dark background, NPF ($70,800 red) vs ZLECAf ($59,000 green), DD exemption highlighted

pie_charts.details: Two donut charts with dark background (#1B232C), NPF regime (red title) and ZLECAf regime (green title), color-coded segments (D.D red, T.V.A yellow, RS/PCS blue), percentage labels visible

savings_highlight.details: Green gradient banner showing $11,800 savings (-16.7%), white text on green background

formalities_section.details: Dark background (#1B232C), amber/orange title (#D97B2D), 5 mandatory documents listed, ZLECAf documents in green section

rules_of_origin.details: Dark background with blue title (#3B82F6), shows 'ZLECAf Rules of Origin' and '40% africain' regional content requirement

multi_country_comparison_tab.details: Dark theme consistent, country badges with flags grouped by region (Afrique du Nord, Ouest, Centrale, Est, Australe)
